title: elaphoglossum gloeorrhizum
intro: Elaphoglossum gloeorrhizum, also known as the "rock fern" or "Elaphoglossum fern," is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in some cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. Elaphoglossum gloeorrhizum is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing pain and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting immune function and reducing stress levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, with recommended dosages typically ranging from 1-3 cups of tea per day or 20-30 drops of tincture as needed.
